title: Wire /ticks-run epic loop with verification and continuation
description: Wire the full epic runner loop: mark ready ticks in_progress with TK_ACTOR=pi:orchestrator, launch all ready ticks in a wave up to max_parallel, wait without polling, classify DONE/DONE_WITH_CONCERNS/NEEDS_CONTEXT/BLOCKED, integrate successes, run post-wave test gates from .tick/config.md, and redispatch/route failures without serializing the whole wave.
acceptance_criteria: /ticks-run <epic> can execute a small disposable epic through at least one wave in worktree mode. Post-wave tests run after merges. Failed verifier output results in repair/continuation/escalation instead of a false close. Tests cover wave scheduling and outcome classification.
